channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: DoorDash introduces relief payments for drivers as the Iran-US war drives up gas prices
item.description: Gas is one of the largest expenses for delivery drivers. With prices continuing to surge, DoorDash is offering a lifeline to Dashers with a new relief program.

item.title: 'If pressed to choose a single TV that fits every viewing need, I would select the LG C5 OLED' — and it's now $1,300 off at Best Buy
item.description: Our TV expert said, 'If pressed to choose a single TV that fits every viewing need, I would select the LG C5 OLED,' and the 65-inch model is $1,300 off at Best Buy right now.

item.title: Attacker Exploits Crypto Stablecoin for a $25 Million Payday
item.description: Resolv Labs was allegedly compromised by someone who got their hands on private AWS keys.

item.title: Donut Lab’s solid-state battery could barely hold a charge after getting damaged
item.description: Donut Lab is on a mission to prove to the world its solid-state battery is real, one independent test at a time. We've seen speed charging tests, extreme heat tests, and not-a-supercapacitor tests. Today's test is to see how the battery hold up under damage. The results: while it could barely sustain a charge, it […]

item.title: Lenovo Legion Go S, Dyson V12s Submarine et Oppo Find X9 : les 3 bons plans high‑tech immanquables du lundi 23 mars 2026
item.description: Les bons plans de ce lundi 23 mars 2026 mettent en avant trois produits stars du moment.

item.title: Apple’s WWDC 2026 event starts June 8th
item.description: Apple has set a date for this year's Worldwide Developers Conference (WWDC), scheduling the keynote and Platforms State of the Union for June 8th through June 12th at Apple Park. As usual, we will be tuned in to find out what's new in the 2027-branded editions of iOS, iPadOS, macOS, watchOS, and tvOS. After last […]

item.title: On sait quand Apple dévoilera iOS 27… et donnera des nouvelles du nouveau Siri
item.description: Apple organisera son grand événement annuel pour les développeurs du 8 au 12 juin. L'édition 2026 de la WWDC sera l'occasion pour le constructeur de lever le voile sur ses futurs systèmes d'exploitation : iOS 27, macOS 27, etc. Et peut-être aussi donner des nouvelles du Siri dopé à l'IA présenté il y a deux ans ?

item.title: ProtonVPN downloads spiked in 62 countries in 2025 — but with VPNs 'more important than ever' the countries responsible weren't all those you'd expect
item.description: ProtonVPN downloads spiked in 2025 across 65 countries worldwide, with shutdowns and censorship driving the surge

item.title: HP’s Copilot+ 24-inch touchscreen All-in-One for office work is $250 off right now - Best Buy's desktop deal is a home office upgrade
item.description: It’s powered by an AMD Ryzen AI 5 340 processor and 16GB DDR5.

item.title: The internet made BTS. Arirang asks what comes next.
item.description: BTS's new album Arirang reflects a fragmented internet, exploring fandom, virality, and connection in the age of TikTok and digital culture.

item.title: Apple's WWDC 2026 is set for June 8-12
item.description: Apple announced that this year's Worldwide Developers Conference (WWDC) will take place from June 8-12. The company tends to be consistent with event timing, so it's no surprise that CEO Tim Cook will take the stage for the keynote on June 8, most likely at 1PM ET. Much of WWDC will take place online and will be free to attend, though there will be an in-person component for select developers, students and media at Apple Park in Cupertino, California. You'll be able to take in WWDC via the Apple Developer app, website and YouTube channel. It will also be available in China on the Apple Develo...

item.title: ‘Starfleet Academy’ Will End After Season 2
item.description: The latest 'Star Trek' show, which was renewed for its second season back in 2024, will now come to an end once it's released.

item.title: MSI mini PC deal: Cubi NUC 1MG Mini Desktop 'can handle a decently heavy day of work without a problem' and it's $120 off at Best Buy
item.description: MSI’s Cubi NUC 1MG mini desktop delivers smooth performance for everyday work, multitasking, and media tasks, and it’s down to a great price right now.

item.title: Strava reveals location of French warship after naval officer logs run on aircraft carrier deck
item.description: A French naval officer’s workout session accidentally became a security incident thanks to Strava — here's how to manage your privacy settings to avoid a similar fate.

item.title: PDP’s wireless guitar controller has returned to its best price to date
item.description: The early 2020s were kind of a dark time if you were a fan of Rock Band. PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X owners didn’t get an improved, more feature-packed guitar controller until early 2024 when PDP launched the Riffmaster. While it launched for $129.99 and later rose to $149.99, you can now grab it […]

item.title: Best Buy’s Tech Fest is officially over, but these leftover deals are still worth your money
item.description: Best Buy's Tech Fest ended on Sunday, but you can still score serious discounts on Apple products, OLED TVs, and laptops.

item.title: Cyberattaque russe contre WhatsApp et Signal : une « vaste campagne mondiale » est en cours
item.description: Des pirates russes s'en prennent actuellement à Signal et WhatsApp. Selon les services de renseignement néerlandais, français et américains, les cyberattaques reposent sur deux tactiques de phishing redoutables. Les intrusions sont susceptibles de passer inaperçues.

item.title: “Likely created with AI-generated code”: This massive ‘vibe-coded’ campaign uses 1,700+ fake filenames to inject malware into your favorite game mods and apps
item.description: Cryptojackers are being distributed through fake software, VPNs, game mods, and more.

item.title: Check out the Ninja Blast if you want a 'fun portable blender' for cheap
item.description: We highly rate the Ninja Blast Portable Blender and it just hit a fantastic low price on Amazon.

item.title: There's a new affordable 100-inch mini-LED TV in town — but would you go for this Toshiba when you can get Hisense and TCL's best TVs for way cheaper?
item.description: Toshiba's new mini-LEDs have a decent specification but the largest size is considerably more expensive than the equivalent Hisense or TCL

item.title: ICE Invades Airports Across the US
item.description: Agents from ICE are being deployed to over a dozen airports around the country, including New York, Atlanta, and Chicago.

item.title: Polymarket’s Coming-Out Party in Washington Was a Disaster
item.description: At the Polymarket pop-up in DC, attendees were supposed to be able to bet on geopolitical crises in real time with their friends. That didn’t happen.

item.title: Mettre fin au « pillage » des auteurs par l’IA : la proposition de loi validée par le Conseil d’État
item.description: La plus haute juridiction administrative a validé une proposition de loi française visant à rééquilibrer le rapport de force entre auteurs et IA. Un feu vert dont se félicitent les sénateurs à l'origine du texte, obtenu malgré l'opposition des lobbys de la tech.

item.title: Travel feels scary and chaotic right now—but Delta, American, and United airlines stocks are soaring today. Here’s why
item.description: Long TSA wait times, ICE agents in airports, and a high-profile plane crash at LaGuardia are making headlines this morning—but it’s not all bad for airlines. Air travel is currently in a state of chaos. TSA agents are calling out of their jobs en masse; security lines are piling up; extreme weather is delaying flights; and on March 23, President Trump deployed ICE agents to multiple major airports, causing an outcry from the public and multiple advocacy groups. And, this morning, an Air Canada plane crash at LaGuardia airport, which killed at least 2 people, was also in the headlines....

item.title: Adieu les pannes d’encre : pourquoi l’imprimante HP Smart Tank 7005 est un investissement malin [Sponso]
item.description: Trouver une imprimante domestique fiable et qui ne coûte pas cher en impression n'est plus une chimère. Elle fait même déjà partie du catalogue de HP : il s'agit de la Smart Tank 7005.

item.title: Hair and skincare tech deals are trickling in ahead of Amazons Big Spring Sale
item.description: The Shark FlexStyle, TheraFace red light mask, and BaByliss hair tools are all on marked down ahead of the Amazon Big Spring Sale.

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs kits de panneaux solaires Plug and Play ? Notre comparatif
item.description: Les panneaux solaires « Plug and Play » produisent de l’énergie électrique et l’injectent dans votre circuit domestique en passant par une simple prise. Quels sont les meilleurs kits de panneaux solaires « Plug and Play » ? Nous en avons testé plusieurs : voici notre comparatif.

item.title: Polymarket is cracking down on insider trading with updated rules
item.description: Polymarket announced that it's taking insider trading more seriously. Seen in its latest press release, the prediction market updated its market integrity rules, specifically those concerning insider trading and market manipulation. While Polymarket is taking the initiative to update its rules, it's likely a response to the rise in suspicious bets, whether it's about the US capture of Nicolás Maduro or the release of a new product from OpenAI. As first reported on by Bloomberg, Polymarket is targeting three specific forms of trading activity. First off, users aren't allowed to trade on "stolen...

item.title: Desperate times: Reddit considers adding ID verification to fight flood of AI bots
item.description: Reddit is looking at potential ways to fight AI bots on the platform, such as ID verification.

item.title: Ce nouveau robot aspirateur-laveur ultra-puissant de Dreame a déjà droit à une réduction de 50 €
item.description: Intelligent, polyvalent et surtout très (très) puissant, le nouveau Dreame L50s Pro Ultra est un robot aspirateur-laveur qui peut faire de l'ombre à pas mal de concurrents. Actuellement, Amazon l'affiche à 699 euros au lieu de 749 euros.

item.title: 'We'd be honored to have a hand in that': Ready or Not 2 directors haven't ruled out saving the canceled Hulu Buffy reboot
item.description: Now that the Buffy reboot has been cancelled by Hulu, all eyes turn to who could save it — and Ready or Not 2 directors would be 'honored'.

item.title: Leonid Radvinsky, the owner of OnlyFans, has passed away
item.description: OnlyFans owner Leonid Radvinsky has passed away at the age of 43 after a battle with cancer.

item.title: Billionaire OnlyFans owner Leonid Radvinsky has died from cancer at 43
item.description: Leonid Radvinsky, the billionaire owner of OnlyFans, has died. He passed "peacefully after a long battle with cancer" at age 43, according to a statement from the platform published by Forbes. He was born in Ukraine, but grew up in Chicago. Radvinsky didn't create OnlyFans. He purchased it back in 2018, though is largely credited with transforming it from a niche website to a gigantic porn empire. The platform became so huge that reports have indicated that Radvinsky personally made nearly $2 million every day in 2024. His net worth at the time of his death grew to $4.7 billion, which had more...

item.title: The New Live-Action ‘Moana’ Trailer Welcomes You to the Rock
item.description: Disney's latest 'reimagining' of one of its animated hits stars Catherine Lagaʻaia as Moana and Dwayne Johnson as Maui; it hits theaters July 10.

item.title: Japanese firms’ buying spree of U.S. homebuilders keeps heating up—4th deal in 5 weeks
item.description: Japan’s domestic population is shrinking and aging (fast!), limiting long-term housing growth and risking a sharp contraction for Japanese homebuilders. So, they’re turning to the U.S. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: Les 10 smartphones les plus populaires de la semaine sur Frandroid : Samsung reste dominateur, Nothing en embuscade
item.description: Pour notre top 10 des smartphones les plus populaires de la semaine sur Frandroid, une vraie concurrence féroce se lance sur Android. Samsung, Nothing, Xiaomi et OnePlus se livrent bataille parmi les appareils les plus populaires sur Frandroid.

item.title: I use the 'invert' prompt to answer problems before they arise
item.description: By adding an “invert” prompt to ChatGPT, you can turn potential mistakes into plans to avoid them.

item.title: iPhone Fold leaks, rumors, and renders: Everything we know
item.description: The latest iPhone Fold rumors and leaks point toward a very impressive display and a massive battery.

item.title: Amazon's March Madness sale is live — here are 13 TVs and soundbars that I personally recommend if you're on a budget
item.description: Amazon's March Madness sale is live as we approach the Sweet Sixteen, and I'm rounding up 13 deals I personally recommend on highly rated TVs and soundbars.

item.title: 'We sincerely apologize for these oversights, and we take full responsibility for it' — Pearl Abyss apologizes for 'unintentional' AI assets spotted in Crimson Desert
item.description: Amid the controversy of generative AI in gaming, Pearl Abyss has issued a swift apology for AI assets spotted in-game.

item.title: Amazons Big Spring Sale is back: The best deals already live on Apple, robot vacuums, headphones, and more
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale is back from March 25 to 31. Shop the best early deals on Apple, headphones, TVs, and more.

item.title: Encore une rumeur sur la fin de OnePlus en Europe
item.description: OnePlus a beau démentir, la rumeur d'un démantèlement ne veut décidément pas mourir. Une nouvelle indiscrétion d'un fuiteur fiable indique que l'activité du constructeur pourrait tout simplement s'arrêter en Europe et aux États-Unis.

item.title: Save $80 on the Kindle Colorsoft ahead of the Big Spring Sale — shop now
item.description: Ahead of the Big Spring Sale, the Kindle Colorsoft is already discounted. Get it now for just $169.99, saving you $80 off.

item.title: 8 Horror Movies to Welcome Spring’s Arrival
item.description: Killer plants, deadly getaways, and sinister rituals await.

item.title: Some writing advice from Project Hail Mary’s Andy Weir
item.description: Andy Weir has done pretty well when it comes to adaptations. His first novel, The Martian, was turned into a movie in 2015, and the Ridley Scott-directed picture earned more than $600 million at the box office. And Project Hail Mary just had a huge opening weekend that puts it on track to be one […]

item.title: Startup Gimlet Labs is solving the AI inference bottleneck in a surprisingly elegant way
item.description: Gimlet Labs just raised an $80 million Series A for tech that lets AI run across NVIDIA, AMD, Intel, ARM, Cerebras and d-Matrix chips, simultaneously.

item.title: Littlebird raises $11M for its AI-assisted ‘recall’ tool that reads your computer screen
item.description: Littlebird is building an AI that reads your screen in real time to capture context, answer questions, and automate tasks, without relying on screenshots.

item.title: FedEx is rolling out AI training to get 400,000 workers ‘promotion-ready’
item.description: FedEx is really thinking about how it implements AI – leaders take the time to select tools, and workers offered AI training.

item.title: Microsoft's eye-opening list of fixes for Windows 11 deals with most major pain points — and you can thank Apple
item.description: Is Microsoft now at panic stations with fixing all Windows 11's problems?

item.title: LG Sound Suite review: Dolby Atmos FlexConnect in a powerful package
item.description: The premise seems simple enough. LG promises that you can set its Sound Suite speakers anywhere and Dolby’s home theater tech will make them perform well. The soundbar, subwoofer and speakers don’t have to go in prescribed locations for the best results, which means you can place them where you need to and move them as you see fit. Of course, this all hinges on the reliability of the underlying tech and LG’s ability to make individual speakers that actually sound good. Like most premium soundbars and complete home theater setups these days, a complete Sound Suite collection is expensive. The ...

item.title: Paradise Season 2 drops a huge bombshell about Link and Sinatra
item.description: In Season 2, episode 7, "Paradise" reveals that Link's real name is Dylan — the same as Sinatra's late son.

item.title: King Harold’s Legendary 200-Mile March ‘Never Happened,’ Study Suggests
item.description: “Only a mad general would force his army to go through that before a battle.”
